title: Thomas & Friends Push-N-Play
excerpt: We were going to wait for daddy to come home from work to put Jack's new Thomas & Friends Push-N-Play together. Although Jack has never watched Thomas on TV, he is obsessed with the trains and also the books. I…
body:
We were going to wait for daddy to come home from work to put Jack's new Thomas & Friends Push-N-Play together. Although Jack has never watched Thomas on TV, he is obsessed with the trains and also the books. I got a little too excited about the arrival of his new gift from Dynacraft, so I decided to set up the camera and just try to do put it together ourselves. Jack was really into the entire process and helping along every step of the way.

Our friends at Dynacraft want to give away a Thomas & Friends Push-N-Play to one of you! Even if you don't have kids of your own around this age (Jack is two and a half) you probably know someone who will enjoy it. This giveaway is open to the US only. Leave a comment below and earn extra entries too! Comments will close 7/18 at midnight and a winner will be announced on 7/19. Good luck, friends! UPDATED: Thanks to all who entered! The giveaway winner is Kristi M! CONGRATS! Please email us back so we can arrange your prize!

a Rafflecopter giveaway
